Home› Workshops› Industry Talk: John Muggleton
record_voice_over Industry Talk · Free · 免费

Playwriting Talk

剧作家创作分享 · From the Page to the Stage

Industry Talk with John Muggleton — Canadian playwright, director, and actor.

John Muggleton
Playwright · Director · Actor · Canada

Canadian playwright, director, and actor. John's play An Act of Grace is receiving its world Chinese-language premiere at CCTF 2026, performed by Dong Fang Drama Group. He will be in Chicago for the premiere and available for this industry talk the day before.

About the Talk | 对谈简介

John Muggleton will speak about how a script is born, how a writer develops a personal style, and how long it takes for a play to move from page to stage. He will also speak about his experience seeing An Act of Grace — a play he wrote years ago — now translated, adapted, and performed in Chinese in Chicago.

这位来自加拿大的编剧、导演与演员，将围绕"剧本如何诞生""如何发展写作风格""一部戏从页面走向舞台需要多久"等主题展开分享，也将与芝加哥本地观众面对面交流自己的创作经验。

Connected to An Act of Grace

The day after this talk, John Muggleton attends the world Chinese-language premiere of his own play — An Act of Grace — performed by Dong Fang Drama Group. The talk and the premiere together form a rare opportunity to engage with a living playwright at the moment his work crosses a new cultural threshold.

See An Act of Grace | 查看演出 →

Topics Covered | 对谈内容

  • How a script is born
  • Developing a personal writing style
  • The journey from page to stage
  • Cross-cultural adaptation and translation
  • Q&A with John Muggleton
